is.t:
The 'Offline Capable' feature badge is not rendering on the landing page. assert 'Offline Capable' in 'PancreaScan
AI-POWERED • FEDERATED LEARNING
AI-Powered Early Detection of Pancreatic Anomalies
Access PancreaScan
\U0001f535' + where 'PancreaScan
AI-POWERED • FEDERATED LEARNING
AI-Powered Early Detection of Pancreatic Anomalies
Access PancreaScan
\U0001f535' = <test_01_landing.TestLandingPage object at 0x0000027C7F0CA450>.body

The 'Local PDF Reports' feature badge is missing from the landing page. assert 'Local PDF Reports' in 'PancreaScan
AI-POWERED • FEDERATED LEARNING
AI-Powered Early Detection of Pancreatic Anomalies
Access PancreaScan
\U0001f535' + where 'PancreaScan
AI-POWERED • FEDERATED LEARNING
AI-Powered Early Detection of Pancreatic Anomalies
Access PancreaScan
\U0001f535' = <test_01_landing.TestLandingPage object at 0x0000027C7F0CA650>.body

The 'Real-Time Analysis' feature badge is not visible on the landing page. assert 'Real-Time Analysis' in 'PancreaScan
AI-POWERED • FEDERATED LEARNING
Pan
AI-Powered Early Detection of Pancreatic Anomalies
\U0001f9e0
On-Device Neural Network
Access PancreaScan
\U0001f535' + where 'PancreaScan
AI-POWERED • FEDERATED LEARNING
Pan
AI-Powered Early Detection of Pancreatic Anomalies
\U0001f9e0
On-Device Neural Network
Access PancreaScan
\U0001f535' = <test_01_landing.TestLandingPage object at 0x0000027C7F0F8F50>.body
selenium.common.exceptions.ElementNotInteractableException: Message: element not interactable (Session info: chrome=148.0.7778.217); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.seleni

The Patient History table is missing one or more column headers (Patient ID, Patient Name, Scan Result). The history table component may have a rendering error. assert False + where False = all(<generator object TestDashboardTabSwitching.test_history_table_column_headers_visible.<locals>.<genexpr> at 0x0000027C7F233300>)

The test timed out waiting for an element to appear. The page element expected by 'test_inference_produces_yolov8_label' did not become visible within the allowed time. This could mean the UI did not load, the element selector is wrong, or the app is slow.

The test timed out waiting for an element to appear. The page element expected by 'test_inference_shows_confidence_score' did not become visible within the allowed time. This could mean the UI did not load, the element selector is wrong, or the app is slow.

The test timed out waiting for an element to appear. The page element expected by 'test_inference_shows_rescan_and_sync_buttons' did not become visible within the allowed time. This could mean the UI did not load, the element selector is wrong, or the app is slow.

The test timed out waiting for an element to appear. The page element expected by 'test_diagnostic_report_opens_after_sync' did not become visible within the allowed time. This could mean the UI did not load, the element selector is wrong, or the app is slow.

The test timed out waiting for an element to appear. The page element expected by 'test_report_heading_visible' did not become visible within the allowed time. This could mean the UI did not load, the element selector is wrong, or the app is slow.

The test timed out waiting for an element to appear. The page element expected by 'test_report_patient_information_section_visible' did not become visible within the allowed time. This could mean the UI did not load, the element selector is wrong, or the app is slow.

The test timed out waiting for an element to appear. The page element expected by 'test_report_shows_patient_id' did not become visible within the allowed time. This could mean the UI did not load, the element selector is wrong, or the app is slow.

The test timed out waiting for an element to appear. The page element expected by 'test_report_shows_patient_name' did not become visible within the allowed time. This could mean the UI did not load, the element selector is wrong, or the app is slow.

The test timed out waiting for an element to appear. The page element expected by 'test_report_analysis_results_section_visible' did not become visible within the allowed time. This could mean the UI did not load, the element selector is wrong, or the app is slow.

The test timed out waiting for an element to appear. The page element expected by 'test_report_download_button_present' did not become visible within the allowed time. This could mean the UI did not load, the element selector is wrong, or the app is slow.

The test timed out waiting for an element to appear. The page element expected by 'test_return_to_dashboard_button_closes_report' did not become visible within the allowed time. This could mean the UI did not load, the element selector is wrong, or the app is slow.

The 'Patient ID' column header is missing from the Patient History table. assert 'Patient ID' in '✅ Welcome back, Dr. Test Doctor!
PancreaScan
\U0001f4ca
Dashboard
\U0001fa7b
Patient History
\U0001f4c8
Analytics
⚙️
Settings
\U0001f6aa Log Out
Hello, Dr. Test Doctor
Clinical Portal Diagnostics Suite
Online
Patient History Records
Secure clinical CT screening scan archives synced from MySQL
All Scans (0)
Normal (0)
Abnormal (0)
PATIENT ID PATIENT NAME SCAN RESULT AI CONFIDENCE SYNC TIMESTAMP ACTIONS
No medical CT scans match the selected category.' + where '✅ Welcome back, Dr. Test Doctor!
PancreaScan
\U0001f4ca
Dashboard
\U0001fa7b
Patient History
\U0001f4c8
Analytics
⚙️
Settings
\U0001f6aa Log Out

Clinical Portal Diagnostics Suite

Secure clinical CT screening scan archives synced from MySQL

Normal (0)
Abnormal (0)
PATIENT ID PATIENT NAME SCAN RESULT AI CONFIDENCE SYNC TIMESTAMP ACTIONS
No medical CT scans match the selected category.' = <test_09_history.TestPatientHistory object at 0x0000027C7F1A96E0>.body

The 'Normal Scans' metric card is not visible in the Analytics tab. assert 'Normal Scans' in '✅ Welcome back, Dr. Test Doctor!

\U0001f4ca

Online

Comprehensive specimen distribution and deep-learning metrics diagnostics
0
NO SCANS

NORMAL SCANS

No scan records recorded under this account. Please perform a new pancreas scan analysis to populate analytics charts.' + where '✅ Welcome back, Dr. Test Doctor!
